# [Clang] Assertion `isDependentContext() && "cannot iterate dependent diagnostics of non-dependent context"` failed.

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176155
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-03-13T13:26:38Z

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 3.4.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/fGoT444x9

## Program
```cpp
template <int> struct bad {
  template <class T, auto =
                         [] {
                           for (int i = 0; i < 100; ++i) {
                             struct LoopHelper {
                               static constexpr void process() {}
                             };
                           }
                         }>
  static void f(T) {}
};

int main() { bad<0>::f(0); }
```

## Program
```cpp
template &lt;int&gt; struct bad {
  template &lt;class T, auto =
                         [] {
                           for (int i = 0; i &lt; 100; ++i) {
                             struct LoopHelper {
                               static constexpr void process() {}
                             };
                           }
                         }&gt;
  static void f(T) {}
};

int main() { bad&lt;0&gt;::f(0); }
```
